4029657899928611","book_info":{"abstract":"【女王女帝+红颜众多+热血暴爽】
萧辰穿越玄幻世界，觉醒变废为宝系统。
本以为是这系统是收垃圾的，没想到是专业回收女王女帝？
第一次回收美杜莎女王，第二次回收柳神女帝，第三次回收恶魔女王，第四次回收北域魔后…
一个个不仅实力超群还美艳无双，被他回收后都竟然都哭着要倒贴？
美杜莎要给他生一窝，柳神要舍身助他修行，恶魔女王要给他洗脚，北域魔后要陪他打架…
爽得萧辰直接原地起飞！
两个月入圣，四个月成帝，半年就成神！
短短一年时间都不到，看着臣服的万族大佬。
萧辰不禁有些感慨，能回收女帝为己用，这无敌可太简单了！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/36e4a41db4fa31f622ef7464635c6688","author":"余生不负卿","author_id":"","book_id":"7194029657899928611","book_name":"每月捡个女帝，系统你是懂我的！","book_short_name":"女帝别白给了","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181828","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":378,"name":"女帝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=378&name=女帝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":850,"name":"无脑爽","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=850&name=无脑爽&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":830,"name":"升级流","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=830&name=升级流&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7196615071056396833","read_count":"49575","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1414546"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.4","serial_count":"63
